title: telemetry — PHP attribute contracts
description: Ten attributes across two sub-namespaces. OTel attributes (7) discovered at build time by CompileInstrumentationRegistry — map class::method → descriptor; runtime uses keepsuit facades under a decorator/aspect. Log attributes (3) discovered by CompileLogContextRegistry — map class → { channel, [enrichers], [redacted_fields] }; runtime is a hash-map lookup + method invocations on the resolving processor.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Param names to lift onto the span attributes.

params.name: sampling_priority
params.description: Override the sampler for this span. `always` = force-sample the whole trace.

params.name: amount
params.description: Fixed increment. Override via `from` to lift from a method param.

params.name: from
params.description: Method param name whose value is used as the increment amount.

params.name: labels
params.description: Param names lifted to metric labels. Must be low-cardinality.

params.name: value
params.description: What to record. duration_ms is the method duration; return_value records the numeric return; from_param lifts a numeric param.

params.name: callback_mode
params.description: True = decorated method is invoked at scrape time. Method must return a number.

params.name: key
params.description: Span attribute key. Semantic convention: `<domain>.<field>` — e.g. `webhook.subscription_id`.

params.name: propagate_to_baggage
params.description: Also propagate this value via W3C Baggage — downstream services + async jobs see it.

params.name: cross_service
params.description: Propagate via HTTP header on outbound calls. Off for internal-only baggage.

params.name: key
params.description: Field name in the emitted log record. Semantic convention: `<domain>.<field>`.

params.name: when
params.description: Conditional evaluation. `on_error` = only compute this enricher for warning+ records.

params.name: cache_within_request
params.description: Cache the enricher's return value for this request. Prevents evaluating the same method N times for N log lines.

params.name: channel
params.description: Monolog channel name. Records emitted from this class (or subclass) route to this channel by default.

params.name: fields
params.description: When applied to a class, list of property names to redact when this instance appears in a log context. When applied to a property, no params needed — that property is redacted.
